pi_items.source: Web search for Aoraki Mackenzie International Dark Sky Reserve confirms its latitude near Lake Tekapo is approximately 44.00 S (-44.00).
Web search for Aoraki Mackenzie International Dark Sky Reserve confirms its longitude near Lake Tekapo is approximately 170.47 E.
Calculated via math.radians(-44.00) and confirmed against verifier.py TARGET_LAT_RAD expected value.
Calculated via math.radians(170.47) and confirmed against verifier.py TARGET_LON_RAD expected value.
Explicitly defined in task description and observation time logic.
Task specifies 10:00 PM local time (NZDT). Web search confirms NZDT in March 2024 is UTC+13, making 22:00 local time equivalent to 09:00 UTC.
Explicitly defined in export_result.sh and task description.
Explicitly defined in export_result.sh and setup_task.sh.
verifier.py evaluates these specific boolean configurations for the display settings.

privileged_info_summary: I verified that the task coordinates for the Aoraki Mackenzie International Dark Sky Reserve are accurate (Lake Tekapo area at approximately 44.00 degrees S, 170.47 degrees E), which convert correctly to the radian values expected by the verifier (-0.76794, 2.97528). I also confirmed that 10:00 PM local time in New Zealand Daylight Time (UTC+13) on March 15, 2024, maps correctly to 09:00 UTC. Finally, the expected output paths (briefing doc, screenshots dir), minimum screenshot count (3), and the expected Stellarium display flags match the logic explicitly checked in the setup and verifier scripts.
